positive: An intricate, stylized geometric floral pattern combined with abstract celestial elements, forming a harmonious and repeating mural print. The design features stylized lunar phases, constellation outlines rendered in negative space, and repeating motifs of stylized lotus flowers and mandalas. Use a color palette of deep midnight blue, burnt gold, and matte cream. The style should be highly detailed line art with strong, graphic silhouettes, reminiscent of Art Nouveau engravings but modernized for a clean, crisp repeat pattern. Ensure the composition is perfectly centered and balanced, suitable for high-contrast fabric printing. Minimal shading, maximum graphic impact. Vector art quality.
negative: blur, watermark, logo, signature, text, artifact, messy, bad anatomy, extra limbs, grain, noise, poorly drawn, low resolution
